title: Shinkalion
wikitext:
[]: Shinkalion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed May 02, 2018 2:59 pm http://carudamon119.tumblr.com/post/173516711613/5日5日放送新幹線変形ロボ-シンカリオンに-エヴァ新幹線500-type-eva登場 Afaik these are the first screenshots. I think it'll just be a short film? SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed May 02, 2018 3:31 pm It looks like the 500 Type Eva made a special appearance in an episode of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion The Animation. Kids are the conductors for trains that transform into giant robots through the use of special cards. Well, why not? That's pretty neat!

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu May 03, 2018 12:16 pm Well... there's that. Also, this image is all levels of perfect  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Jul 11, 2018 10:55 pm It looks liek there is another eva-themed episode of this show. This time with Hikari and her sisters. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-5549.html

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jul 27, 2018 1:41 am http://www.eva-info.jp/4552 http://www.eva-info.jp/4491 More on that Hikari episode. Shinji is there too.

[]: Shinkalion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Aug 03, 2018 8:06 pm I’ve never heard of this kid's anime nor do I really care to watch it. BUT with an upcoming episode basically being a tie-in with Evangelion I have to admit I’m curious to give the one episode a view. The Eva episode airs August 11th and is confirmed to have the voices of Megumi Ogata (Shinji), Kotono Mitsuishi (Misato) & Junko Iwao will be back as Hikari AND will voice her two sisters. There’s a possibility more of a cast will jump in for little walk on bits too. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/intere ... de/.135059 Seriously, I don’t care about the rest of this show but I will want to watch this episode and you nerds will have to help me get it! Looks like even Rei & Asuka will be in on the fun. If they get Yuko Miyamura to come back even for a line would this be her first TV performance in over a decade? https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=4go8XsxizDY Does it look kinda cheap & pandery as hell? Of course. Is a legitimate kids show taking place in the Evangelion universe a horrifiying prospect if you think about in any terms beyond merchanising? Absolute. (All these kids are gonna die...) But, since it’s only 20 minutes I’ll watch it. Pandery as it is.

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Aug 04, 2018 1:31 am I'm a fuckn nerd,of course I'll watch it lol. Excited to hear their voices. Apparently Tsurumaki originally designed Hikari's sisters: https://twitter.com/khara_inc2/status/1025629184607965185 Also, dear God, that Angel is a mix of (at least) Sachiel, Shamshel, Sahaquiel, Zeruel and Rebuild's Third Angel.

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Mon Aug 06, 2018 8:12 pm cyharding wrote: It looks liek there is another eva-themed episode of this show. This time with Hikari and her sisters. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-5549.html

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Aug 09, 2018 1:42 am Abomination Angel art: http://jimpluff.tumblr.com/post/176791970094/the-shinkalion-angel-code

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Aug 09, 2018 1:21 pm I kinda like it actually... it reminds me of something from the Zelda series

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Thu Aug 09, 2018 11:08 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Abomination Angel art: http://jimpluff.tumblr.com/post/176791970094/the-shinkalion-angel-code

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Aug 09, 2018 11:25 pm Genuinely annoyed this thread has been ignored Oh well

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 10, 2018 6:11 am I'm sorry. I think much of it has to do with the nature of the organization of the forums here. "Everything Else Evangelion" simply doesn't get as much traffic in its current form. We've discussed potential reorganization of the forums backstage and we have settled on a new arrangement which I think will be beneficial to everybody. However, we're now simply waiting on one of our tech savvy people to earn enough free time to implement it. Keep in mind that such reorganization would be tedious and very time consuming, so bear with us until then.

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Aug 10, 2018 9:14 am S'all good. I love this place. Anywho, Animenewsnetwork has confirmed Megumi Hayashibara & more surprisingly Yuko Miyamura will voice Rei & Asuka in the crossover episode! It might only be a line or two each but that's still pretty cool. I don't know too much about Yuko Miyamura the person but isn't she pretty much retired from voice acting except for the Rebuild films themselves? Would this be her first non-theatrical role since the mid 00s? https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2018-08-09/rei-asuka-vas-confirmed-angel-themed-villain-revealed-for-shinkalion-giant-eva-episode/.135295

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Aug 10, 2018 12:03 pm I have to correct myself, I found something that it resembles closer than the something from Zelda I previously had in mind: Zygarde

[]: Re: Eva Shinkansen anime             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Aug 10, 2018 1:09 pm a e s t h e t i c angel from 2.0 is sad because it didn't get into the mix. Or it was too hipster about it.

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Aug 11, 2018 12:03 am It seems Shinkalion was trending topic on twitter yesterday. That's the power the Eva cast has. No offense to the Shinkalion show, but I probably wouldn't have been interested otherwise (and that's OK since it's for children).

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Aug 11, 2018 10:46 am Here’s all the Rei & Asuka from the episode I think. One line each. Of course Asuka’s starts off with the only acceptable option. “Anta Baka”. https://youtu.be/CJhWnDimIuY

[]: Re: Shinkalion             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Aug 11, 2018 11:19 am ^ My ears have been blessed.
